title: Static Accessibility Evidence, WCAG Mapping, and Review Handoff · Spiral Systems Review
summary: A delayed operations review reconstructs static accessibility evidence, wcag mapping, and review handoff from revision, authorization, seed, URL, robots decision, request, response bytes, tree identity, record provenance, frontier transition, goroutine owner, report row, failure, cleanup, and recovery evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for WCAG-linked static finding ledger after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case pract…
objectives: Classify informative, decorative, functional, linked, complex, grouped, and text images using surrounding purpose and review uncertainty.
Audit document language, headings, landmarks, labels, instructions, table relationships, and duplicate identifiers as evidence, not templates.
Identify native semantics and attribute risks while noting accessible names, roles, values, and states may need browser computation.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Authorized site auditing and Go Separate evidence from confidence · Review Conformance Boundary
steps.instruction:
review case — A review Go team handles case 5221 during a redirect, DNS, body, and checkpoint fault exercise. Build deterministic Go evidence to map static image, structure, semantics, interaction risks, uncertainty, and WCAG review boundaries; owner permission, robots preference, and legal-review conclusions stay distinct; then reorder one origin, retry, channel, context, goroutine, Colly callback, checkpoint, or shutdown event and prove ownership. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original URL, robots, sitemap, HTTP, HTML, frontier, accessibility, browser-service, and report fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, x/net/html, goquery, Colly, files, processes, race, load, assistive-technology review, containers, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Link findings to WCAG 2.2 criteria, affected users, page state, severity rationale, evidence, uncertainty, and human owner without conformance claims.

Inspect the Conformance Boundary trace for this review case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: Authorized site auditing and Go Separate evidence from confidence · Review Conformance Boundary.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for link findings to wcag 2.2 criteria, affected users, page state, severity rationale, evidence, uncertainty, and human owner without conformance claims. For Authorized site auditing and Go Separate evidence from confidence · Review Conformance Boundary, keep Conformance Boundary connected to executable Go authorization, URL, robots, response, tree, frontier, goroutine, report, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.

content.text: For Conformance Boundary, distinguish a claim from evidence by locating the relevant precondition, trace or invariant, and changed input result.

Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original URL, robots, sitemap, HTTP, HTML, frontier, accessibility, browser-service, and report fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, x/net/html, goquery, Colly, files, processes, race, load, assistive-technology review, containers, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. lines.label: risk
lines.text: Zero static findings means the full site conforms to WCAG.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Link findings to WCAG 2.2 criteria, affected users, page state, severity rationale, evidence, uncertainty, and human owner without conformance claims. Artifact under review: WCAG-linked static finding ledger.

options.text: For separate evidence from confidence, crawl one convenient page, omit owner permission, revision, URL and robots policy, body and parser limits, record and graph provenance, frontier and goroutine ownership, Colly differences, changed fixtures, privacy, accessibility, recovery, and controlled native transfer, then accept plausible rows as Go crawler proof.
The record names the assumption, applies Conformance Boundary, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.
The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample. That claim does not survive the separate evidence from confidence evidence boundary.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Link findings to WCAG 2.2 criteria, affected users, page state, severity rationale, evidence, uncertainty, and human owner without conformance claims.
